message:
fix: use tmux session state to prevent false 'done' status for running polecats (gt-o01h4l)

loadFromBeads determined polecat state purely from beads issue assignment:
no assigned issue → StateDone. But a polecat with an active tmux session
is clearly still working — the beads assignment may not have been recorded
yet or the query may have returned empty. Now checks tmux session as a
secondary signal: if session is alive, state is Working regardless of beads.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
